---
name: Governance waiver request
description: Request a time-limited exception to the unified governance policy
title: 'waiver(governance): <policy section> for <scope>'
labels: ["governance"]
assignees: ''
---

<!-- governance-waiver-request -->

## Duplicate Check (required before submitting)

- [ ] I searched [existing issues](https://github.com/kushin77/code-server/issues?q=is%3Aissue) for an existing waiver for this policy violation
- [ ] No active waiver already covers this exact scope
- [ ] If duplicate, I linked the canonical waiver issue instead of creating a new one

## Waiver Request

- Requested by:
- PR/Issue:
- Policy violated:
- Scope (repos/paths/users):
- Violation details:
- Justification:
- Expiration (YYYY-MM-DD):
- Impact:
- Owner for remediation:

## Risk & Controls

- Security impact:
- Compensating controls:
- On-prem impact on 192.168.168.31:

## Approval

- Approved by:
- Approval date (YYYY-MM-DD):
- Approval signature (sha256:<64-hex>):
- Approval notes:

## Closure Tracking

- [ ] Registry entry added to docs/governance/WAIVERS.md
- [ ] Follow-up remediation issue linked
- [ ] Expiration reminder owner confirmed
